message:
feat(ntm-client): add projectHealth, alerts, activity methods

Exposes three new NTM robot-mode flags that were available in the CLI
but not yet wired into the typed client: --robot-health (project-level),
--robot-alerts={session}, and --robot-activity={session}. Includes Zod
schemas, option interfaces, and contract tests with fixtures.

Closes bd-2n73.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
